untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (HTF structural levels vs LTF retests), pivot identification with minimum touch counts, and dynamic ATR-based trailing stops with unspecified thresholds. The backtest engine lacks multi-timeframe comparison operators and structural level detection logic. Critical parameters (htf_to_ltf_ratio, ltf_retest_bars_back, ltf_confirmation_candles, minimum_structure_touches_on_htf, and ATR trailing stop distance) are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and cannot be inferred from available indicators alone.
translation_notes: This rule fundamentally requires multi-timeframe logic not supported by single-timeframe indicator conditions. Recommend: (1) Implement explicit support/resistance detection on HTF via local extrema, (2) Add multi-timeframe comparison operators (HTF_crosses_above_LTF, etc.), (3) Define structural level touch counting logic, (4) Specify all [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters with concrete values. Placeholder conditions use pivot levels as proxy for structural levels, but this does not capture the full multi-timeframe confirmation logic required.
